name: samvaad-platform-facts
description: Sarvam Samvaad verified facts (2026-07-14): self-serve public since ~June 8 2026; dashboard.sarvam.ai/agents 308-redirects to platform.sarvam.ai/agents (login-gated, 403 to bots). Channels confirmed: telephone in+out, WhatsApp (incl voice calls), web/mobile SDKs (JS/RN/Flutter) per AWS Marketplace listing prodview-x5iks3edtmaio. Exotel is Sarvam's telephony backbone (exotel.com blog). No public Samvaad docs on docs.sarvam.ai (llms.txt has only LiveKit/Pipecat DIY guides, which inherit the public-API reasoning delay). Samvaad reportedly runs sarvam-30b privately. Self-serve per-minute pricing NOT public; API pricing: STT Rs30/hr, bulbul:v3 Rs30/10K chars, sarvam-30b Rs2.5/10 per 1M tokens in/out, Rs100 free API credits.

title: Two-track Samvaad migration, gated on 4 in-platform checks
rationale: Latency alone no longer forces migration: custom stack + fast-LLM bridge (already shipped, needs only CHAT_LLM_API_KEY) reaches ~1-1.5s, within ~0.5s of realistic Samvaad numbers (independent tests 0.8-1.8s vs sub-500ms marketing). Recommendation in docs/samvaad-migration-plan.md: Track 1 set fast-LLM key + re-export prod store now (Railway volume wedged); Track 2 pilot Marathi agent on platform.sarvam.ai, decide at gates G1 telephony path exists, G2 median latency <=1.5s measured, G3 cost <=2x current ~Rs2-3/min, G4 voice/transfer parity. WS-audio bridge into Samvaad rejected: no public media-ingress API.
